response.justification: Meets the 15-year experience minimum with recent AI-agent infrastructure exposure at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrated AI/ML products, strategic advisory experience, or director-level IC visibility. Current Staff Engineer title is below the director-level expectation, and the resume shows no advanced AI/ML credentials or strategic customer partnerships required for this specialized AI strategy role.
strengths: Exceeds minimum 15+ years of software engineering across multiple senior positions
Recently engaged in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Proven full-stack builder with polyglot expertise and demonstrated ability to learn across domains
concerns: No shipped AI/ML products or platforms in portfolio—critical gap for AI strategy role
Missing Master's/PhD in AI and formal AI/ML expertise despite AI strategy focus
Limited evidence of strategic customer advisory, cloud platform depth, or director-level IC impact

key_factors.factor: No demonstrated AI/ML products or strategic expertise
Current Staff level below director-level IC requirement
Recent AI infrastructure work showing emerging alignment
